name: claude-books-hub
description: Series HUB landing for claude-books.brandon-behring.dev — the apex index page, a book-scaffold-astro consumer. Built onto the combined dist/ root by scripts/assemble-hub.mjs, above the four book workspaces. Uses the 'tools' profile with Base showChrome={false} (book-scaffold-astro >=4.25.2, #163) for a chrome-light landing — no katex deps.
